EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Failed to remove a pipeline of the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} viewed pipeline #{object.id} of the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} restarted pipeline #{object.id} of the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} viewed the status of pipeline #{object.id} of the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} canceled pipeline #{object.id} of the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} started a pipeline of the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
Failed to view the status of pipeline #{object.id} of the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} removed pipeline #{object.id} of the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
Failed to cancel pipeline #{object.id} of the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
Failed to view pipeline #{object.id} of the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
Failed to start a pipeline of the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
Failed to restart pipeline #{object.id} of the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
